mapper.select:
SELECT BACO.CTRL_TYPE , USR.USER_NM AS USER_NM , BACP.USE_FLAG , BACP.GATE_CD , BACP.GATE_CD AS GATE_CD_ORI , BACP.BUYER_CD , BACP.BUYER_CD AS BUYER_CD_ORI , BACP.CTRL_CD , BACP.CTRL_CD AS CTRL_CD_ORI , BACP.CTRL_USER_ID AS CTRL_USER_ID , BACP.CTRL_USER_ID AS CTRL_USER_ID_ORI , 'U' AS INSERT_FLAG , BACP.REG_DATE AS REG_DATE , BACP.MOD_DATE AS MOD_DATE , BACO.CTRL_NM , GETCOMPANYNAME(BACP.GATE_CD, BACP.BUYER_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS BUYER_NM , getDeptName(USR.GATE_CD, USR.COMPANY_CD, USR.DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS DEPT_NM , getUserName(BACP.GATE_CD, BACP.REG_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS REG_USER_NM , getUserName(BACP.GATE_CD, BACP.MOD_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS MOD_USER_NM FROM STOCBACP BACP JOIN STOCBACO BACO ON (BACO.GATE_CD = BACP.GATE_CD AND BACO.CTRL_CD = BACP.CTRL_CD) JOIN STOCCVUR USR ON (BACP.CTRL_USER_ID = USR.USER_ID AND BACP.GATE_CD = USR.GATE_CD) WHERE BACP.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BACP.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND BACO.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND USR.DEL_FLAG = '0'
AND BACP.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD}
AND BACO.CTRL_TYPE = #{CTRL_TYPE}
AND UPPER(GETCTRLNAME(BACP.GATE_CD, BACP.BUYER_CD, BACP.CTRL_CD, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{CTRL_NM}) '%'
AND UPPER(USR.USER_NM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{USER_NM}) '%'
AND UPPER(USR.USER_ID) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{USER_ID}) '%'
AND UPPER(USR.DEPT_CD) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{DEPT_CD}) '%'
AND UPPER(getDeptName(USR.GATE_CD, USR.COMPANY_CD, USR.DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{DEPT_NM}) '%'
ORDER BY BACO.CTRL_TYPE, BACP.CTRL_CD, USR.USER_NM
